name: Health and Wellness Claims
description: Campaigns making health claims, wellness claims, or weight loss claims. Triggers substantiation requirements and restrictions on targeting vulnerable populations.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US FTC Health Claims
regulatory_frameworks.summary: FTC requires competent and reliable scientific evidence for health claims in advertising. Active enforcement against unsubstantiated weight loss, supplement, and wellness claims.

regulatory_frameworks.name: UK ASA Health Claims
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Advertising Standards Authority enforces EU-derived nutrition and health claims regulations. Claims must be authorized and substantiated.

guidance: Health and wellness claims face FTC scrutiny even for non-pharmaceutical products. Weight loss, supplement efficacy, and anti-aging claims are high-enforcement areas. Targeting people with health conditions to sell unproven treatments is a particular concern.
